case_title: HENRY UY TONG VS. HUANG YINGMING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YINGMING, HUANG
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG, HENRY UY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YINGMING, HUANG THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR WITH A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $752.23 FILED BY TONG, HENRY UY AS TO DEFENDANT YINGMING, HUANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2010 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO RETURN WITH CANTONESE INTERPRETER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
